title: Inspeksi Pagi Pak Maman
theme: Eksplorasi tentang bagaimana seorang penjaga keamanan menemukan kedamaian dan humor sinis dalam rutinitas sehari-hari di tengah kekonyolan birokrasi yang tak ada habisnya.

cover.prompt: Early morning in the grand lobby of an Integrated Public Service Building. Soft, warm dawn light illuminates the spacious area, with a prominent automatic revolving door central in the frame. A lone figure, a security guard in a slightly loose uniform, stands as a quiet silhouette near the door, embodying a sense of routine and gentle anticipation. Cinematic composition, rule of thirds, shallow depth of field.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading

meta.plan_summary: Pak Maman, a cynical security guard, finds humor in the absurd daily routine of a public service building. He observes Ibu Sulastri's unending bureaucratic struggles, which eventually find a bizarre resolution through a 'lidah mertua' plant vlog, reinforcing Pak Maman's peaceful acceptance of life's inherent silliness.
meta.target_emotion: cynical amusement, wry humor, resignation with a smile
